atomicity.message: Staged payload is one v0.1.3 release-prep slice: changelog/release install badge/docs plus tracker state for the rel13 chain; dogfood mode is already landed and included.

conditions.message: git diff, tests, and current lint configuration passed for this docs/tracker prep payload.
evidence: git diff --cached --check exited 0.
go test ./... passed across all packages.
burpvalve lint returned status not_enforced with scaffold-only/no executable lint commands declared, matching current repo lint configuration rather than a false lint pass.

conditions.message: The staged slice is a small docs/tracker release-prep payload with no generated archives, binaries, scratch dirs, or unrelated source files staged.
evidence: go run ./cmd/burpvalve hash --staged --json reported sha256:dc6850c9482805e04c97cc452b27f26b57516b116f366fa61774e134d522dad2 and exactly five included paths: .beads/issues.jsonl, README.md, docs/CHANGELOG.md, docs/CHANGELOG_RESEARCH.md, docs/release-install.md; no hash_excluded_staged_payload.
git diff --cached --name-status listed only those five docs/tracker paths.
git diff --cached --check passed with no output.
git diff --cached --name-only | rg '^(dist/|bin/|\.ntm/|\.doctor/|/tmp/|tmp/)' produced no matches.

conditions.message: The docs match the release-prep claim and do not bypass tag/package/visibility gates or over-authorize later release actions.
evidence: git show :docs/CHANGELOG.md lines 29-81 showed the v0.1.3 section frames the release as private and says repository visibility/public-launch metadata are unchanged.
git log --oneline v0.1.2..HEAD --reverse showed the post-v0.1.2 commits through a17a1ca; the staged changelog lists representative commits covering the requested scope including dogfood mode.
git grep --cached -n v0.1.3/a17a1ca/dogfood over staged docs showed v0.1.3 badge/install/changelog references and dogfood commit a17a1ca.

conditions.message: The staged payload is release documentation/tracker prep only; it adds no functions, code paths, or tests.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status shows only .beads/issues.jsonl, README.md, docs/CHANGELOG.md, docs/CHANGELOG_RESEARCH.md, and docs/release-install.md.
No code files or testable functions are staged.

conditions.message: The release-prep docs satisfy changelog coverage, latest-version references, dogfood inclusion, and lint status.
evidence: git show :docs/CHANGELOG.md showed a new v0.1.3 timeline row and detailed section covering every owner-requested capability named in the packet, including dogfood mode after a17a1ca.
git show :README.md showed the release badge changed from v0.1.2 to v0.1.3 while private/proprietary badges remain.
git show :docs/release-install.md showed the pinned install snippet now uses --version v0.1.3.
git grep --cached -n v0.1.2 over current-release docs found only historical/source-window references, not stale current-release install snippets.
go run ./cmd/burpvalve lint --json returned status not_enforced, enforcement_level scaffold-only, command_count 0, fatal false.

conditions.message: The changelog and research note carry concrete release evidence and the staged tracker state correctly reflects dogfood closure and release-prep in progress.
evidence: Inspected staged docs/CHANGELOG.md: it adds v0.1.3 dated 2026-07-03 and names guided lint setup, verifier orchestration, Beads close/drift flow, prompt-bank/export, orchestrator target/config work, commit evidence helpers, hook recovery hints, NTM bridge docs, skill prompt-bank refactor, and dogfood-mode findings prompt.
Verified all representative v0.1.3 commits listed in the changelog resolve locally with git cat-file -e, including a17a1ca.

Parsed staged .beads/issues.jsonl: dogfood-mode bead is closed with commit a17a1ca, attestation backpressure/attestations/7f3b608...json, and verifier refs; rel13 prep bead remains in_progress before this commit lands.
docs/CHANGELOG_RESEARCH.md adds a v0.1.3 live release note citing git log v0.1.2..HEAD, closed Beads, committed attestations, and owner-directed v0.1.3 release scope.

conditions.message: The staged payload stays within release-prep docs/tracker scope and leaves tag/package validation and public/OSL work to later beads.
evidence: git diff --cached -- README.md docs/CHANGELOG.md docs/CHANGELOG_RESEARCH.md docs/release-install.md showed only release badge/install/changelog/research note updates.
git grep --cached for project-readiness-kit-rel13-prepare-changelog-docs-6xi showed the prep bead remains in_progress and its dependent package-validation bead remains open.
git diff --cached -- .beads/issues.jsonl showed the dogfood-mode dependency closed with commit/attestation refs; no release package or visibility work is closed by this staged payload.

conditions.message: The staged diff changes only release docs/tracker text and performs no destructive operation or release publication.
evidence: Inspected staged docs/tracker diff; it changes release badge/version examples and changelog text only.
No dist/, bin/, release asset, workflow, deletion script, tag, GitHub release command, visibility operation, or destructive shell command is staged.
docs/CHANGELOG.md explicitly says the release is private and repository visibility/public-launch metadata are unchanged; public launch, license flip, and anonymous verification are out of scope.

conditions.message: The staged docs are internally consistent with the supplied hash, commit window, v0.1.3 target, and proprietary/forbidden package metadata.
evidence: go run ./cmd/burpvalve hash --staged --json matched packet hash sha256:dc6850c9482805e04c97cc452b27f26b57516b116f366fa61774e134d522dad2.
git log --oneline v0.1.2..HEAD --reverse included the representative commit IDs cited by the v0.1.3 changelog section, including a17a1ca for dogfood mode.
git show :docs/CHANGELOG.md and git show :docs/release-install.md showed v0.1.3 date/version references consistent with packet context and current release-prep target.
git grep --cached -n license: proprietary/distribution: forbidden -- skill/burpvalve/SKILL.md showed the packaged skill frontmatter still has license proprietary and distribution forbidden.

conditions.message: The release-prep docs do not change repository visibility, license posture, skill distribution policy, credentials, or executable release behavior.
evidence: git grep --cached -n -i public/visibility/private/license/MIT/Apache over staged docs and skill frontmatter showed README still advertises private/proprietary status and the v0.1.3 changelog says visibility/public-launch metadata are unchanged.
git show :skill/burpvalve/SKILL.md showed frontmatter unchanged at license: proprietary and distribution: forbidden.
git diff --cached --name-status showed no workflow, credentials, install script behavior, release artifact, or permission-surface file staged.

conditions.message: No UI or visual surface is changed by this release-prep docs/tracker payload.
evidence: The staged payload changes Markdown docs and tracker JSONL only.
No UI/TUI rendering code, screenshots, demos, CSS, SVGs, or visual assets are staged. README badge text changes are static Markdown metadata, not a rendered UI surface in this repo gate.

conditions.message: The staged payload introduces no runtime path, algorithm, build behavior, or performance-sensitive code.
evidence: The staged payload is release documentation/tracker metadata only.
git diff --cached --stat shows 5 files changed: .beads/issues.jsonl, README, changelog, changelog research, and release install docs.

conditions.message: The staged changelog and install docs preserve the private/proprietary boundary and do not claim public release authority.
evidence: Inspected staged changelog and release-install changes: they prepare private v0.1.3 docs and pinned install text only.
README still shows status-private_early_tooling and license-proprietary; skill/burpvalve/SKILL.md remains license: proprietary and distribution: forbidden per rg check.
The staged changelog states public launch, license flip, and anonymous verification remain out of scope, and no repo visibility/license/public launch metadata is changed.
